This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-mhr7-2xmv-4c4q. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
OpenClaw before 2026.3.31 lacks browser-origin validation in HTTP operator endpoints when operating in trusted-proxy mode, allowing cross-site request forgery attacks. Attackers can exploit this by sending malicious requests from a browser in trusted-proxy deployments to perform unauthorized actions on HTTP operator endpoints.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-2xp4-qhr4-xqm2", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-04T21:55:56Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2xp4-qhr4-xqm2", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-2xp4-qhr4-xqm2"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-23T22:16:41Z", "published_at": "2026-04-24T00:31:51Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-mhr7-2xmv-4c4q", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41347", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/6b3f99a11f4d070fa5ed2533abbb3d7329ea4f0d", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-cross-site-request-forgery-via-missing-browser-origin-validation-in-http-operator-endpoints", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2xp4-qhr4-xqm2"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: OpenClaw: HTTP operator endpoints lack browser-origin validation in trusted-proxy mode", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-04T21:56:00Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-2xp4-qhr4-xqm2", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.3.31", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.3.31"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-05-04T21:55:56Z"}

title: Duplicate Advisory: OpenClaw: HTTP operator endpoints lack browser-origin validation in trusted-proxy mode
